events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Zuckerberg San Francisco General for client 1016. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: renal. Allergies: fish, shellfish. Sodium ceiling 500 mg/meal, carbs 35–70 g/meal. Prefers Mexican; dislikes coconut milk, eggplant. Cooking ability: microwave. 7 meals/week, zone Western Addition.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Turkey Picadillo with Rice
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'renal': meal lacks 'renal-friendly' tag.

events.title: Rejected: Chicken Fajita Bowl
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'renal': meal lacks 'renal-friendly' tag.

events.title: Matched: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/500 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 35–70) ✓, no fish/shellfish ✓.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/500 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 35–70) ✓, no fish/shellfish ✓.

events.title: Matched: Ginataang Gulay with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 401/500 mg ✓, carbs 51 g (target 35–70) ✓, no fish/shellfish ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1016 added to route R-WEST-1 (Western Addition), delivery 2026-07-21, window 14:00–16:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1016: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
